omniProcessElements.name: IP_SaveAssessmentResponse
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "IP_SaveAssessmentResponse", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Competency_SaveAssessmentResponse", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "omniProcessId" : "%omniProcessId%", "omniscriptId" : "%omniscriptId%", "Step1" : "%Step1%", "AssessmentEnvelopeItemId" : "%ContextId%", "Err_RunningContext" : "IP_SaveAssessmentResponse", "Err_CtxId" : "%ContextId%", "Err_ProcessType" : "IP", "AssessmentName" : "Clinician Onboarding Experience Survey" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "NA_HomePage", "validationRequired" : "Submit", "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "pubsub" : false, "message" : { }, "targetType" : "Web Page", "objectAction" : "home", "recordAction" : "view", "loginAction" : "login", "targetFilter" : "Recent", "targetId" : "%ContextId%", "variant" : "brand", "iconName" : "", "iconVariant" : "", "iconPosition" : "left", "replace" : true, "targetLWCLayout" : "lightning", "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "targetUrl" : "/s" }

childElements.name: CES_Identification
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "I knew who my Clinician Experience Specialist (CES) was before my first shift.", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "1", "developerName" : "1", "value" : "1", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "2", "developerName" : "2", "value" : "2", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "3", "developerName" : "3", "value" : "3", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "4", "developerName" : "4", "value" : "4", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "5", "developerName" : "5", "value" : "5", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: CES_Responsiveness
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "When I had a question or issue before or during my first shift, my CES responded in a timely manner.", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "1", "developerName" : "1", "value" : "1", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "2", "developerName" : "2", "value" : "2", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "3", "developerName" : "3", "value" : "3", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "4", "developerName" : "4", "value" : "4", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "5", "developerName" : "5", "value" : "5", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: First_Day_Logistics
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "First-day logistics (arrival instructions, parking, badging, access) were clear and well-coordinated.", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "1", "developerName" : "1", "value" : "1", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "2", "developerName" : "2", "value" : "2", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "3", "developerName" : "3", "value" : "3", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "4", "developerName" : "4", "value" : "4", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "5", "developerName" : "5", "value" : "5", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Introduction
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Quick feedback after your first shift\r\nPlease take 60 seconds to share feedback on your onboarding experience through your first clinical shift.\r\n
\r\n", "text" : "Quick feedback after your first shift
Please take 60 seconds to share feedback on your onboarding experience through your first clinical shift.


", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: Optional
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "What, if anything, surprised you most during onboarding or your first shift?", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 1000, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Overall_Experience
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Overall, my onboarding experience from contract signature through my first shift was streamlined and well-managed.", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "1", "developerName" : "1", "value" : "1", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "2", "developerName" : "2", "value" : "2", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "3", "developerName" : "3", "value" : "3", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "4", "developerName" : "4", "value" : "4", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "5", "developerName" : "5", "value" : "5", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Ownership_Escalation
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Before my first shift, I clearly understood who to contact if something went wrong and felt comfortable doing so.", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "1", "developerName" : "1", "value" : "1", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "2", "developerName" : "2", "value" : "2", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "3", "developerName" : "3", "value" : "3", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "4", "developerName" : "4", "value" : "4", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "5", "developerName" : "5", "value" : "5", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Pre_Arrival_Expectations
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "The information I received before my first shift accurately set expectations for what I would experience.", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "1", "developerName" : "1", "value" : "1", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "2", "developerName" : "2", "value" : "2", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "3", "developerName" : "3", "value" : "3", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "4", "developerName" : "4", "value" : "4", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "5", "developerName" : "5", "value" : "5", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Support_on_First_Shift
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "During my first clinical shift, I felt supported and knew where to go for help when needed.", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "1", "developerName" : "1", "value" : "1", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "2", "developerName" : "2", "value" : "2", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "3", "developerName" : "3", "value" : "3", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "4", "developerName" : "4", "value" : "4", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "5", "developerName" : "5", "value" : "5", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Survey_Instructions_2
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Please rate each statement using the scale below:\r\n1 = Strongly Disagree / Very Poor → 5 = Strongly Agree / Excellent\r\n
", "text" : "Please rate each statement using the scale below:
1 = Strongly Disagree / Very Poor → 5 = Strongly Agree / Excellent

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: Technology_Readiness
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "I had appropriate access and preparation for required systems (EHR, logins, ordering) by my first shift.", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "1", "developerName" : "1", "value" : "1", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "2", "developerName" : "2", "value" : "2", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "3", "developerName" : "3", "value" : "3", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "4", "developerName" : "4", "value" : "4", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "5", "developerName" : "5", "value" : "5", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: Step1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Clinician Onboarding Experience Survey", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3.0, "nextLabel" : "Finish", "nextWidth" : 3.0, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000.0, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000.0, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }
